channel.title: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site
channel.description: Hi trying to install frontity with **npx frontity create my-site** Next step is cd my-site, but there's no command prompt >. How do I continue? Thanks for any help

item.title: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site
item.dc:creator: Johan
item.description:
Anything you do within your Frontity project is for Frontity.

Your WordPress setup (theme, plugins, etc.) are not included in this installation.

Simply follow 🚀 Getting started - Frontity Docs to get a simple setup up and running.

Read full topic
item.source: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site

item.title: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site
item.dc:creator: davidm.me
item.description:
Ok, so press Enter. Thanks that worked.
Now not clear if I’ve 1 site or 2 - WordPress and/or Frontity.
When choosing a theme is that for WordPress or Frontity?

Read full topic
item.source: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site

item.title: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site
item.dc:creator: davidm.me
item.description:
Hi trying to install frontity with
npx frontity create my-site
Next step is cd my-site, but there’s no command prompt >.
How do I continue?
Thanks for any help

Read full topic
item.source: Cmd line hangs running npx frontity create my-site
